name: good first issue
description: A great starting point for new contributors with limited experience

name: help wanted
description: Community contributions are welcome and encouraged on this item

name: priority: critical
description: Must be resolved immediately — blocks releases or causes data loss

name: priority: high
description: Needs attention soon — not blocking, but don't let it sit

name: priority: low
description: Minor issue or improvement that can be deferred without impact

name: priority: medium
description: Should be addressed in the normal course of development

name: status: can't reproduce
description: The reported issue could not be reproduced with the provided steps

name: status: confirmed
description: The issue has been verified and reproduced by a maintainer

name: status: duplicate
description: This issue or pull request already exists elsewhere

name: status: needs information
description: Additional details or clarification from the author are required before proceeding

name: status: wont do/fix
description: This has been reviewed and will not be addressed or implemented

name: status: invalid
description: This issue or pull request is not valid, off-topic, or submitted in error

name: type: bug
description: Something is broken or not behaving as expected

name: type: discussion
description: An open-ended conversation, RFC, or topic that needs team input

name: type: documentation
description: Relates to docs, README updates, guides, or inline code comments

name: type: enhancement
description: An improvement to existing functionality without adding a new feature

name: type: dependencies
description: Relates to dependency updates, version bumps, or package management

name: type: epic
description: A large theme of work that groups related issues and sub-tasks

name: type: feature request
description: A request to add new functionality that does not currently exist

name: type: question
description: A general question or support request that needs clarification

name: release
description: Marks a pull request as a pending release — merge to publish a new version

name: semver: major
description: This release includes breaking changes and bumps the major version

name: semver: minor
description: This release adds new functionality in a backwards-compatible way

name: semver: patch
description: This release contains only backwards-compatible bug fixes

name: semver: explicit
description: This release uses an explicitly specified version rather than an auto-detected bump
